title: C001: Add Keystone container image and release config
summary: Addresses greptile-apps[bot] review #9 feedback: (1) Tests 2, 3, 4, 5, and 7 in test_apply_constraint_overrides.sh now capture exit codes with `|| exit_code=$?` and assert them, matching the pattern already present in Tests 1 and 6 — preventing silent test aborts under `set -euo pipefail`. (2) The gcc verification command in docs/reference/container-images.md was changed from `sh -c 'which gcc; echo $?'` (which always exits 0) to `which gcc && echo 'FAIL' || echo 'PASS'` for clear human-readable pass/fail output. All 25 shell test assertions pass.

tests_checklist.item: Tests exist and pass (25/25 assertions pass)
Edge cases covered (no-op, version replacement, removal, comments/blanks, multiple overrides, missing file, case-insensitive)
Error cases covered (missing constraints file exits non-zero)
Exit code capture pattern consistent across all 7 test functions

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (exit code capture idiom matches Tests 1 and 6)
No code duplication beyond intended test repetition
Changes are minimal and focused on review feedback

security_checklist.item: No security-relevant changes in this diff

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible — mechanical addition of 3 lines per test function

fail_fast_checklist.item: Exit codes captured and asserted immediately after script invocation

defensive_checklist.item: All script invocations guard against silent failure under set -euo pipefail
